title: stelis recurvilabia
intro: Stelis recurvilabia, also known as the Ant Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis recurvilabia include the potential treatment of various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
